expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly notes AGENTS docs were not provided and cannot be validated: "AGENTS docs (not provided in evidence bundle)" and "alignment including AGENTS docs cannot be validated" / "AGENTS alignment is unverified". While SKILL.md/README.md/reference.md alignment is covered, the full case focus (including AGENTS docs) is not fully covered/verified.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: The result asserts consistency among the primary docs under test and provides doc-to-doc alignment checks (responsibilities, phase model 0–7, artifacts, spawn manifest contract). E.g., "Status: aligned across `SKILL.md` / `reference.md` / `README.md`" and detailed sections 1–5 showing alignment with SKILL.md/reference.md/README.md.
